title: Assignment-aware ready sort in ComputeReady
definition_of_done: ComputeReady(index, issues, workerID string, now ...int64). sortReady: assigned-to-me first, unassigned next, other-assigned last. --worker flag on trls ready. Caller in ready.go updated. Tests pass.
outcome: Updated ComputeReady signature to ComputeReady(index, issues, workerID string, now ...int64). sortReady now uses assignmentTier: assigned-to-me=0, unassigned=1, other-assigned=2. Added --worker flag to trls ready. Updated all test callers. Tests pass including new assignment-aware sort tests.

notes.msg: Scope overlap with E3 detected at claim time
